mapper.select: select l.* from log l left join emp e on l.operate_emp_id = e.id and l.operate_emp_name = e.name
mapper.insert: insert into log(operate_emp_id, operate_time, class_name, method_name, method_params, return_value, cost_time, operate_emp_name) values(#{operateEmpId}, #{operateTime}, #{className}, #{methodName}, #{methodParams}, #{returnValue}, #{costTime}, #{operateEmpName})
